creator: web@umich.edu
text:
As I try to determine what is wrong with this 14.2-PRERELEASE system and my inability to build (using portmaster) the devel/glib20 port I decided to look into a working 14.1-STABLE system where devel/glib20 and some 1220 other ports have built just fine.  I decided to look into where the locales live.  What I did was to compare the number of files in /usr/share/locale on both systems.  This is what I found:

On the working 14.1 system there are 195 directories in /usr/share/locale

On the problem 14.2-PRERELEASE system there is ONE directory (C.UTF-8)!!!

So now my problem has devolved to finding why there are 194 directories missing on the 14.2-PRERELEASE system.  Is this a bug/feature of 14.2-PRERELEASE or have I left something out or I need to build some port that will provide these directories.  Can anyone provide a clue?  Thank you in advance.

.
